name: Norwich Inn Boiled Chicken Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Use boned and skinned chicken breasts.
2. Crush the garlic cloves.
3. Use only the white part of leeks; wash and cut into 1-inch slices.
4. Cut celery and carrots into 1-inch slices.
5. Core cabbage and cut into 8 wedges.
6. Use medium-sized potatoes.
7. Spray a 4-5 quart nonstick saucepot with vegetable cooking spray and place over moderate heat.
8. Sauté the chicken until lightly browned on both sides.
9. Add wine, garlic, leeks, and celery. Cook for 5 minutes.
10. Add carrots, cabbage, potatoes, tomatoes, caraway seeds, tarragon (if no fresh is available, use 1 teaspoon dried), bay leaf, and chicken broth (preferably reduced sodium and defatted).
11. Bring to a boil over high heat; reduce the heat to low.
12. Cover and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
13. Spoon chicken and vegetables into heated soup plates with some of the broth.
14. Sprinkle with parsley.
